description: imgsz960: imgsz 640->960 for thin/elongated crack classes
no_mosaic: disable mosaic augmentation (may fragment thin linear crack features)
focal_loss: focal loss (fl_gamma=1.5) to address class imbalance (Pothole 4.4%)
cos_lr: cosine LR schedule + lower initial LR for stabler fine-tuning
copy_paste: copy-paste augmentation to boost rare-class (Pothole/Alligator) exposure
